title: GTU Exam Time Table 2026 OUT

detail.title: GTU Exam Time Table 2026 OUT
detail.short_info: GTU Exam Time Table 2026 is out for Summer 2026 exams. Gujarat Technological University has released theory and practical exam schedules for BE, Diploma, BPharm, MBA, MCA, and more at timetable.gtu.ac.in. Check semester-wise exam dates, PDF download link, and complete details here.

content.text: Gujarat Technological University (GTU) Ahmedabad has officially released the GTU Exam Time Table 2026 for Summer 2026 examinations. The timetable covers theory and practical exams for various undergraduate and postgraduate programs including BE, Diploma, BPharm, MBA, MCA, and more. Students can check the detailed schedule on the official website - https://timetable.gtu.ac.in/.

The Summer 2026 exams are scheduled to begin in May 2026 as per the academic calendar. Students need their enrollment number or other login credentials to view or download the timetable PDF. Always verify the exact dates, timings, and exam centers from the official notification and contact the university in case of any discrepancy.

GTU has published the Summer 2026 exam timetable for regular and remedial students across multiple faculties. The schedule includes theory exams, practical exams, and jury sessions for different semesters and zones. Students are advised to download the official PDF from the GTU timetable portal for accurate information.

rows: BE, Diploma Engineering, BPharm, Pharm.D, MBA, MCA, BBA, M.Arch, and others

sections.heading: GTU Exam Time Table 2026 Subject Wise

content.text: The GTU Summer 2026 exam timetable provides subject-wise dates for theory and practical examinations. Students can find detailed schedules for their specific branch, semester, and zone on the official portal. The dates are zone-wise for practical exams in pharmacy and other programs. Always cross-check with your institute for any updates.
Download the GTU Exam Time Table 2026 PDF here: Official GTU Timetable Portal

rows: Check zone-wise schedule on official site
Bachelor of Hotel Management & Catering Technology (BHMCT)
Practical Exam / Jury Time Table Summer-2026
Practical Exam / Jury Time Table Summer-2026

sections.heading: How to Download GTU Exam Time Table 2026

content.text: Students can easily download the GTU Exam Time Table 2026 from the official GTU timetable portal. The process is simple and requires no login for most timetables. Follow the steps below to access your schedule quickly.

items: Visit the official GTU timetable website at https://timetable.gtu.ac.in/.
On the homepage, select the current session Summer 2026 from the available options.
Choose your course, semester or year, and branch from the dropdown menus.
Locate the relevant theory or practical timetable link for your program.
Click on the PDF link to open the timetable in a new tab.
Download the PDF file and take a printout for future reference.

content.text: Students are advised to check the official timetable carefully for exam dates, timings, and instructions. Keep a printed or digital copy handy during exam preparation and refer to it regularly.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in GTU Exam Time Table 2026

content.text: The official GTU Exam Time Table 2026 PDF contains all essential information required for smooth examination conduct. It helps students plan their preparation according to the exact schedule.
